# Legacy Office Fixtures

`sample.doc` is Apache POI test data from:

https://raw.githubusercontent.com/apache/poi/trunk/test-data/document/47304.doc

`sample.ppt` is Apache POI test data from:

https://raw.githubusercontent.com/apache/poi/trunk/test-data/slideshow/41071.ppt

Both fixtures are sourced from the Apache POI project and are licensed under
the Apache License, Version 2.0. See https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0.
